title: Creamy Sun-Dried Tomato Chicken Orzo (High-Protein Recipe) | Eati
introduction: Creamy Sun-Dried Tomato Chicken Orzo is a rich-feeling meal that stays high-protein and meal-prep friendly. Chicken, sun-dried tomatoes, and parmesan create deep flavor while orzo makes it satisfying.

sections.heading: Ingredients
sections.content:
- Chicken
- Orzo
- Sun-dried tomatoes
- Parmesan
- Garlic
- Chicken broth
- Herbs (basil or thyme)
- Salt and pepper

sections.heading: Instructions
sections.content:
1. Cook orzo in broth until tender.
2. Sear or cook chicken until done, then set aside.
3. Saute garlic and sun-dried tomatoes briefly.
4. Stir in parmesan and herbs; adjust seasonings.
5. Fold in chicken and combine with orzo; serve and log in Eati.

sections.heading: Calories, Fat, and Protein (Estimated)
sections.content:
Calories: 618 kcal per serving (estimated)
Fat: 27g
Protein: 40g

Tip: if you need lower calories, reduce cheese slightly and increase herbs/vegetables.

conclusion: This orzo meal is great for protein-focused meal prep. Use Eati to match your serving size to your calorie deficit.
